quote: We will drill, baby, drill.
summary: Inauguration: a National Energy Emergency and day-one energy orders — but no day-one tariffs, only a signal of 25% Canada/Mexico duties for Feb 1.

quote: Today, I have implemented a 25% Tariff on Imports from Mexico and Canada (10% on Canadian Energy), and a 10% additional Tariff on China.
summary: Three IEEPA orders: 25% on Canada/Mexico (10% Canadian energy) and +10% on China, effective Feb 4.

quote: I just spoke with President Claudia Sheinbaum of Mexico… she agreed to immediately supply 10,000 Mexican Soldiers on the Border.
summary: After calls with Mexico and Canada, Trump paused the 25% tariffs 30 days; the S&P pared a 600+ point intraday drop to close ~-0.76%.
The +10% China tariff took effect (no pause); China retaliated with energy tariffs, critical-mineral export controls, and a Google probe.
Section 232: a flat 25% on steel, aluminum raised to 25%, all exemptions ended; effective March 12.
25% Canada/Mexico tariffs took effect and China rose to 20%, triggering a broad intraday selloff (S&P -1.8%, Nasdaq -2.6% at the lows; both pared losses into the close).

quote: I have instructed my Secretary of Commerce to add an ADDITIONAL 25% Tariff, to 50%, on all STEEL and ALUMINUM COMING INTO THE UNITED STATES FROM CANADA… This will go into effect TOMORROW MORNING, March 12th.
summary: Threatened to double Canada steel/aluminum tariffs to 50% over Ontario's power surcharge — reversed to 25% the same afternoon.

quote: the U.S. will shortly place a 200% Tariff on all WINES, CHAMPAGNES, & ALCOHOLIC PRODUCTS COMING OUT OF FRANCE AND OTHER E.U. REPRESENTED COUNTRIES.
summary: Threatened a 200% EU wine/spirits tariff; the same day the S&P closed in correction, down 10.1% from its Feb 19 record.

quote: This will continue to spur growth that you've never seen before.
summary: 25% tariffs on all imported automobiles and key parts; auto stocks fell next day (GM -7.3%, Ford -3.7%).

quote: My fellow Americans, this is Liberation Day… It's our declaration of economic independence.
summary: 'Liberation Day' reciprocal tariffs (10% baseline + steep country rates) triggered a historic crash: ~-10.5% two-day S&P, ~$5T+ wiped, worst week since 2020.

quote: MY POLICIES WILL NEVER CHANGE. THIS IS A GREAT TIME TO GET RICH, RICHER THAN EVER BEFORE!!!
summary: On the second crash day (China retaliated with 34% tariffs), Trump said his policies would never change and it was a great time to get rich.

quote: CHINA PLAYED IT WRONG, THEY PANICKED - THE ONE THING THEY CANNOT AFFORD TO DO!
summary: Amid the worst two-day market drop since 2020, Trump dismissed China's retaliation as panic.

quote: BE COOL! Everything is going to work out well. The USA will be bigger and better than ever before!
summary: Hours before announcing the tariff pause, Trump urged calm as markets reeled.

quote: THIS IS A GREAT TIME TO BUY!!! DJT
summary: Posted ~3h40m before the 90-day pause; it later drew market-timing/insider-trading scrutiny (Trump Media closed +22.67% that day).

quote: I have authorized a 90 day PAUSE… of 10%… I am hereby raising the Tariff charged to China… to 125%.
summary: The 90-day pause (to a 10% baseline) while raising China to 125% ignited one of history's biggest rallies: S&P +9.52%, Nasdaq +12.16%, Dow +2,962.

quote: 'Too Late' Jerome Powell… is always TOO LATE AND WRONG… Powell's termination cannot come fast enough!
summary: Trump's first explicit call to fire Powell, branding him 'Too Late' and demanding rate cuts.

quote: there can be a SLOWING of the economy unless Mr. Too Late, a major loser, lowers interest rates, NOW.
summary: Renewed attack on Powell; markets sold off on Fed-independence fears: S&P -2.36%, Dow -971, Nasdaq -2.55%.

quote: I have no intention of firing him.
summary: Trump walked back the firing threats, easing Fed-independence fears; markets rallied: Dow +1,017, S&P +2.51%.
US–China Geneva 90-day truce: US cut China tariffs 145%→30%, China cut US tariffs 125%→10%. S&P +3.26%, Nasdaq +4.35%, Dow +1,160.

quote: Moody's Ratings has downgraded the Government of United States of America's long-term issuer and senior unsecured ratings to Aa1 from Aaa.
summary: Moody's stripped the US of its last AAA rating; by May 19 the 30-yr yield briefly topped 5% as stocks wobbled then steadied.

quote: iPhone's that will be sold in the United States… will be manufactured and built in the United States, not India… If that is not the case, a Tariff of at least 25% must be paid by Apple.
summary: Warned Apple that US-sold iPhones must be US-made or face a 25%+ tariff; AAPL fell ~3%.

quote: I am recommending a straight 50% Tariff on the European Union, starting on June 1, 2025.
summary: Threatened a flat 50% EU tariff from June 1, saying talks were 'going nowhere'; stocks fell a 4th straight day.

quote: I received a call today from Ursula von der Leyen… requesting an extension on the June 1st deadline… I agreed to the extension — July 9, 2025.
summary: After a call with von der Leyen, Trump delayed the 50% EU tariff to July 9; stocks rebounded next session.

quote: You call that chickening out? It's called negotiation… That's a nasty question. To me, that's the nastiest question.
summary: Asked about the 'TACO trade' (Trump Always Chickens Out), Trump bristled and defended his tariff reversals as negotiation.

quote: The easiest way to save money in our Budget… is to terminate Elon's Governmental Subsidies and Contracts.
summary: The Musk–Trump falling-out over the spending bill; Trump threatened Musk's federal contracts, triggering Tesla's worst day ever: TSLA -14.3%, ~$151B wiped.

quote: Iran must make a deal, before there is nothing left… JUST DO IT, BEFORE IT IS TOO LATE.
summary: Israel launched 'Operation Rising Lion'; oil spiked (WTI +7.6%) and stocks fell (S&P -1.13%).

quote: We have completed our very successful attack on the three Nuclear sites in Iran, including Fordow, Natanz, and Esfahan… NOW IS THE TIME FOR PEACE!
summary: US 'Operation Midnight Hammer' struck three Iranian nuclear sites, announced Saturday night (markets closed) — setting up Monday's reaction.

quote: EVERYONE, KEEP OIL PRICES DOWN. I'M WATCHING! YOU'RE PLAYING RIGHT INTO THE HANDS OF THE ENEMY. DON'T DO IT!
summary: Trump jawboned oil lower after the strikes; with Iran's retaliation contained, WTI plunged ~7.2% and stocks rose.

quote: It has been fully agreed by and between Israel and Iran that there will be a Complete and Total CEASEFIRE… an Official END to THE 12 DAY WAR.
summary: Trump announced an Israel–Iran ceasefire ending the '12 Day War'; markets extended gains and oil kept falling.

quote: We basically have two countries that have been fighting so long and so hard that they don't know what the f*** they're doing.
summary: With the ceasefire shaky, Trump vented before NATO; markets rallied anyway: S&P +1.11%, oil down ~6%.
